mapper.select: /* selectBmb01List */ WITH BVMA AS ( SELECT A.COMPKEY, A.WAREKEY, A.OWNERKY, A.PTNRKEY, A.BLRPMGB, A.BLRCSGB, A.BLRTKGB, A.BLRUNIT, A.DOCCATE, A.DOCTYPE, A.BLRCOST, A.BLRTKNM , CASE WHEN A.BLRDTGB = 'Y' AND A.BLRMFGB = 'PM' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CONCAT(#{blhyymm}, A.BLRCFDT), INTERVAL 1 MONTH),'%Y%m%d') WHEN A.BLRDTGB = 'Y' AND A.BLRMFGB = 'TM' THEN DATE_FORMAT(CONCAT(#{blhyymm}, A.BLRCFDT),'%Y%m%d') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CONCAT(#{blhyymm},'01'),'%Y%m%d') END AS STRDATE , CASE WHEN A.BLRDTGB = 'Y' AND A.BLRMTGB = 'PM' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CONCAT(#{blhyymm}, A.BLRCTDT), INTERVAL 1 MONTH),'%Y%m%d') WHEN A.BLRDTGB = 'Y' AND A.BLRMTGB = 'TM' THEN DATE_FORMAT(CONCAT(#{blhyymm}, A.BLRCTDT),'%Y%m%d') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(CONCAT(#{blhyymm},'01')),'%Y%m%d') END AS LSTDATE FROM BVLRMA A INNER JOIN ( SELECT COMPKEY, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, PTNRKEY, BLRPMGB, BLRCSGB, BLRTKGB, BLRUNIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, MAX(BLRDATE) AS BLRDATE FROM BVLRMA WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND BLRDATE <= #{blhyymm} AND BLUSEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY COMPKEY, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, PTNRKEY, BLRPMGB, BLRCSGB, BLRTKGB, BLRUNIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE ) B ON A.COMPKEY = B.COMPKEY AND A.WAREKEY = B.WAREKEY AND A.OWNERKY = B.OWNERKY AND A.PTNRKEY = B.PTNRKEY AND A.BLRPMGB = B.BLRPMGB AND A.BLRCSGB = B.BLRCSGB AND A.BLRTKGB = B.BLRTKGB AND A.BLRUNIT = B.BLRUNIT AND A.DOCCATE = B.DOCCATE AND A.DOCTYPE = B.DOCTYPE AND A.BLRDATE = B.BLRDATE ), BPMA AS ( SELECT A.COMPKEY, A.WAREKEY, A.OWNERKY, A.PTNRKEY, A.BLRPMGB, A.BLRCSGB, A.BLRTKGB, A.BLRUNIT, A.DOCCATE, A.DOCTYPE, A.BLRTQTY, A.BLRCOST, A.BLRTKNM , CASE WHEN A.BLRDTGB = 'Y' AND A.BLRMFGB = 'PM' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CONCAT(#{blhyymm}, A.BLRCFDT), INTERVAL 1 MONTH),'%Y%m%d') WHEN A.BLRDTGB = 'Y' AND A.BLRMFGB = 'TM' THEN DATE_FORMAT(CONCAT(#{blhyymm}, A.BLRCFDT),'%Y%m%d') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CONCAT(#{blhyymm},'01'),'%Y%m%d') END AS STRDATE , CASE WHEN A.BLRDTGB = 'Y' AND A.BLRMTGB = 'PM' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CONCAT(#{blhyymm}, A.BLRCTDT), INTERVAL 1 MONTH),'%Y%m%d') WHEN A.BLRDTGB = 'Y' AND A.BLRMTGB = 'TM' THEN DATE_FORMAT(CONCAT(#{blhyymm}, A.BLRCTDT),'%Y%m%d') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(CONCAT(#{blhyymm},'01')),'%Y%m%d') END AS LSTDATE FROM BPLRMA A INNER JOIN ( SELECT COMPKEY, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, PTNRKEY, BLRPMGB, BLRCSGB, BLRTKGB, BLRUNIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, BLRTQTY, MAX(BLRDATE) AS BLRDATE FROM BPLRMA WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND BLRDATE <= #{blhyymm} AND BLUSEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY COMPKEY, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, PTNRKEY, BLRPMGB, BLRCSGB, BLRTKGB, BLRUNIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, BLRTQTY ) B ON A.COMPKEY = B.COMPKEY AND A.WAREKEY = B.WAREKEY AND A.OWNERKY = B.OWNERKY AND A.PTNRKEY = B.PTNRKEY AND A.BLRPMGB = B.BLRPMGB AND A.BLRCSGB = B.BLRCSGB AND A.BLRTKGB = B.BLRTKGB AND A.BLRUNIT = B.BLRUNIT AND A.DOCCATE = B.DOCCATE AND A.DOCTYPE = B.DOCTYPE AND A.BLRTQTY = B.BLRTQTY AND A.BLRDATE = B.BLRDATE ) SELECT BV.COMPKEY, BV.WAREKEY, BV.OWNERKY, MO.OWNAMLC , BV.PTNRKEY, MP.PTNAMLC , BV.BLRPMGB, MC.COMCDTX AS BLRPMNM , CASE WHEN BV.BLRTKNM != NULL OR TRIM(BV.BLRTKNM) != '' THEN BV.BLRTKNM ELSE BV.BLRCSGB END AS BLRCSGB , BV.BLRTKGB, BV.BLRUNIT, BV.DOCCATE, BV.DOCTYPE, BV.BLRCOST , CASE WHEN BV.DOCCATE = ST.DOCCATE AND BV.DOCTYPE = ST.DOCTYPE THEN ST.REFCQTY WHEN BV.DOCCATE = RC.DOCCATE AND BV.DOCTYPE = RC.DOCTYPE THEN RC.REFCQTY WHEN BV.DOCCATE = SH.DOCCATE AND BV.DOCTYPE = SH.DOCTYPE THEN SH.REFCQTY ELSE 0 END AS REFCQTY , CASE WHEN BV.DOCCATE = ST.DOCCATE AND BV.DOCTYPE = ST.DOCTYPE THEN ST.BLRAMOT WHEN BV.DOCCATE = RC.DOCCATE AND BV.DOCTYPE = RC.DOCTYPE THEN RC.BLRAMOT WHEN BV.DOCCATE = SH.DOCCATE AND BV.DOCTYPE = SH.DOCTYPE THEN SH.BLRAMOT ELSE 0 END AS BLRAMOT FROM BVMA BV INNER JOIN MOWRMA MO ON BV.COMPKEY = MO.COMPKEY AND BV.OWNERKY = MO.OWNERKY INNER JOIN MPTNMA MP ON BV.COMPKEY = MP.COMPKEY AND BV.PTNRKEY = MP.PTNRKEY INNER JOIN V_MCODEM MC ON BV.COMPKEY = MC.COMPKEY AND BV.BLRPMGB = MC.COMCDVL AND MC.COMCDKY = 'BLRPMGB' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ST.COMPKEY, ST.WAREKEY, ST.OWNERKY, ST.DOCCATE, ST.DOCTYPE, ST.SKUGR01, SUM(ST.REFCQTY) AS REFCQTY, ST.BLRUNIT, SUM(ST.BLRAMOT) AS BLRAMOT FROM ( SELECT ST.COMPKEY, ST.WAREKEY, ST.OWNERKY, BV.DOCCATE, BV.DOCTYPE, ST.SKUMKEY, SK.SKUGR01, BV.BLRUNIT , CASE WHEN BV.BLRUNIT = ST.SUOMKEY THEN IFNULL(SUM(ST.STOTQTY),0) WHEN BV.BLRUNIT != ST.SUOMKEY THEN IFNULL(CEILING(SUM(ST.STOTQTY) / PK.PACKQTY),0) ELSE 0 END AS REFCQTY , CASE WHEN BV.BLRUNIT = ST.SUOMKEY THEN IFNULL(SUM(ST.STOTQTY),0) * BV.BLRCOST WHEN BV.BLRUNIT != ST.SUOMKEY THEN IFNULL(CEILING(SUM(ST.STOTQTY) / PK.PACKQTY),0) * BV.BLRCOST ELSE 0 END AS BLRAMOT FROM BSTKDY ST INNER JOIN BVMA BV ON ST.COMPKEY = BV.COMPKEY AND ST.WAREKEY = BV.WAREKEY AND ST.OWNERKY = BV.OWNERKY AND BV.DOCCATE = '600' AND BV.DOCTYPE = '690' INNER JOIN MSKUWC SK ON ST.COMPKEY = SK.COMPKEY AND ST.WAREKEY = SK.WAREKEY AND ST.OWNERKY = SK.OWNERKY AND ST.SKUMKEY = SK.SKUMKEY AND SK.SKUGR01 = BV.BLRTKGB LEFT JOIN MPAKMA PK ON SK.COMPKEY = PK.COMPKEY AND SK.WAREKEY = PK.WAREKEY AND SK.PACKKEY = PK.PACKKEY AND PK.TRUNTYP = BV.BLRUNIT WHERE ST.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND ST.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND ST.STKDATE BETWEEN BV.STRDATE AND BV.LSTDATE GROUP BY ST.COMPKEY, ST.WAREKEY, ST.OWNERKY, BV.DOCCATE, BV.DOCTYPE, ST.SKUMKEY, SK.SKUGR01, BV.BLRUNIT ) ST WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY ST.COMPKEY, ST.WAREKEY, ST.OWNERKY, ST.DOCCATE, ST.DOCTYPE, ST.SKUGR01, ST.BLRUNIT ) ST ON BV.COMPKEY = ST.COMPKEY AND BV.WAREKEY = ST.WAREKEY AND BV.OWNERKY = ST.OWNERKY AND BV.DOCCATE = ST.DOCCATE AND BV.DOCTYPE = ST.DOCTYPE AND BV.BLRTKGB = ST.SKUGR01 AND BV.BLRUNIT = ST.BLRUNIT LEFT JOIN ( SELECT RC.COMPKEY, RC.WAREKEY, RC.OWNERKY, RC.DOCCATE, RC.DOCTYPE, RC.SKUGR01, SUM(RC.REFCQTY) AS REFCQTY, RC.BLRUNIT, SUM(RC.BLRAMOT) AS BLRAMOT FROM ( SELECT RC.COMPKEY, RC.WAREKEY, RC.OWNERKY, RC.DOCCATE, RC.DOCTYPE, RC.SKUMKEY, SK.SKUGR01, BV.BLRUNIT , CASE WHEN BV.BLRUNIT = RC.RCHSUOM THEN IFNULL(SUM(RC.RCHSQTY),0) WHEN BV.BLRUNIT != RC.RCHSUOM THEN IFNULL(CEILING(SUM(RC.RCHSQTY) / PK.PACKQTY),0) ELSE 0 END AS REFCQTY , CASE WHEN BV.BLRUNIT = RC.RCHSUOM THEN IFNULL(SUM(RC.RCHSQTY),0) * BV.BLRCOST WHEN BV.BLRUNIT != RC.RCHSUOM THEN IFNULL(CEILING(SUM(RC.RCHSQTY) / PK.PACKQTY),0) * BV.BLRCOST ELSE 0 END AS BLRAMOT FROM WRCVIT RC INNER JOIN BVMA BV ON RC.COMPKEY = BV.COMPKEY AND RC.WAREKEY = BV.WAREKEY AND RC.OWNERKY = BV.OWNERKY AND RC.DOCCATE = BV.DOCCATE AND RC.DOCTYPE = BV.DOCTYPE INNER JOIN MSKUWC SK ON RC.COMPKEY = SK.COMPKEY AND RC.WAREKEY = SK.WAREKEY AND RC.OWNERKY = SK.OWNERKY AND RC.SKUMKEY = SK.SKUMKEY AND SK.SKUGR01 = BV.BLRTKGB LEFT JOIN MPAKMA PK ON SK.COMPKEY = PK.COMPKEY AND SK.WAREKEY = PK.WAREKEY AND SK.PACKKEY = PK.PACKKEY AND PK.TRUNTYP = BV.BLRUNIT WHERE RC.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND RC.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND RC.POSTDAT BETWEEN BV.STRDATE AND BV.LSTDATE AND RC.RCVITST IN ('RVCOMP','RVPART') AND IFNULL(TRIM(RC.RCVRSCD),'') != 'Z1' GROUP BY RC.COMPKEY, RC.WAREKEY, RC.OWNERKY, RC.DOCCATE, RC.DOCTYPE, RC.SKUMKEY, SK.SKUGR01, BV.BLRUNIT ) RC WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY RC.COMPKEY, RC.WAREKEY, RC.OWNERKY, RC.DOCCATE, RC.DOCTYPE, RC.SKUGR01, RC.BLRUNIT ) RC ON BV.COMPKEY = RC.COMPKEY AND BV.WAREKEY = RC.WAREKEY AND BV.OWNERKY = RC.OWNERKY AND BV.DOCCATE = RC.DOCCATE AND BV.DOCTYPE = RC.DOCTYPE AND BV.BLRTKGB = RC.SKUGR01 AND BV.BLRUNIT = RC.BLRUNIT LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SH.COMPKEY, SH.WAREKEY, SH.OWNERKY, SH.DOCCATE, SH.DOCTYPE, SH.SKUGR01, SUM(SH.REFCQTY) AS REFCQTY, SH.BLRUNIT, SUM(SH.BLRAMOT) AS BLRAMOT FROM ( SELECT OS.COMPKEY, OS.TOWARKY AS WAREKEY, OS.OWNERKY, OS.DOCCATE, OS.DOCTYPE, OS.SKUMKEY, SK.SKUGR01, BV.BLRUNIT , CASE WHEN BV.BLRUNIT = OS.SUOMKEY THEN IFNULL(SUM(OS.SHCFQTY),0) WHEN BV.BLRUNIT != OS.SUOMKEY THEN IFNULL(CEILING(SUM(OS.SHCFQTY) / PK.PACKQTY),0) ELSE 0 END AS REFCQTY , CASE WHEN BV.BLRUNIT = OS.SUOMKEY THEN IFNULL(SUM(OS.SHCFQTY),0) * BV.BLRCOST WHEN BV.BLRUNIT != OS.SUOMKEY THEN IFNULL(CEILING(SUM(OS.SHCFQTY) / PK.PACKQTY),0) * BV.BLRCOST ELSE 0 END AS BLRAMOT FROM OCOSAL OS FORCE INDEX(IX_OCOSAL05) INNER JOIN BVMA BV ON OS.COMPKEY = BV.COMPKEY AND OS.TOWARKY = BV.WAREKEY AND OS.OWNERKY = BV.OWNERKY AND OS.DOCCATE = BV.DOCCATE AND OS.DOCTYPE = BV.DOCTYPE INNER JOIN MSKUWC SK ON OS.COMPKEY = SK.COMPKEY AND OS.TOWARKY = SK.WAREKEY AND OS.OWNERKY = SK.OWNERKY AND OS.SKUMKEY = SK.SKUMKEY AND SK.SKUGR01 = BV.BLRTKGB LEFT JOIN MPAKMA PK ON SK.COMPKEY = PK.COMPKEY AND SK.WAREKEY = PK.WAREKEY AND SK.PACKKEY = PK.PACKKEY AND PK.TRUNTYP = BV.BLRUNIT WHERE OS.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND OS.TOWARKY = #{warekey} AND OS.POSTDAT BETWEEN BV.STRDATE AND BV.LSTDATE AND OS.OUBSTAT = 'SHPF' GROUP BY OS.COMPKEY, OS.TOWARKY, OS.OWNERKY, OS.DOCCATE, OS.DOCTYPE, OS.SKUMKEY, SK.SKUGR01, BV.BLRUNIT ) SH WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY SH.COMPKEY, SH.WAREKEY, SH.OWNERKY, SH.DOCCATE, SH.DOCTYPE, SH.SKUGR01, SH.BLRUNIT ) SH ON BV.COMPKEY = SH.COMPKEY AND BV.WAREKEY = SH.WAREKEY AND BV.OWNERKY = SH.OWNERKY AND BV.DOCCATE = SH.DOCCATE AND BV.DOCTYPE = SH.DOCTYPE AND BV.BLRTKGB = SH.SKUGR01 AND BV.BLRUNIT = SH.BLRUNIT WHERE 1=1 /* 금액 0 일 경우 제외. */ HAVING BLRAMOT > 0 UNION ALL SELECT A.COMPKEY, A.WAREKEY, A.OWNERKY, MO.OWNAMLC , A.PTNRKEY, MP.PTNAMLC , A.BLRPMGB, MC.COMCDTX AS BLRPMNM , CASE WHEN A.BLRTKNM != NULL OR TRIM(A.BLRTKNM) != '' THEN A.BLRTKNM ELSE A.BLRCSGB END AS BLRCSGB , A.BLRTKGB , '-' AS BLRUNIT, '-' AS DOCCATE, '-' AS DOCTYPE , A.BLRCOST , 0 AS REFCQTY, A.BLRCOST AS BLRAMOT FROM BFLRMA A INNER JOIN MOWRMA MO ON A.COMPKEY = MO.COMPKEY AND A.OWNERKY = MO.OWNERKY INNER JOIN MPTNMA MP ON A.COMPKEY = MP.COMPKEY AND A.PTNRKEY = MP.PTNRKEY INNER JOIN V_MCODEM MC ON A.COMPKEY = MC.COMPKEY AND A.BLRPMGB = MC.COMCDVL AND MC.COMCDKY = 'BLRPMGB' INNER JOIN ( SELECT COMPKEY, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, PTNRKEY, BLRPMGB, BLRCSGB, BLRTKGB, MAX(BLRDATE) AS BLRDATE FROM BFLRMA WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND BLRDATE <= #{blhyymm} AND BLUSEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY COMPKEY, WAREKEY, OWNERKY, PTNRKEY, BLRPMGB, BLRCSGB, BLRTKGB ) B ON A.COMPKEY = B.COMPKEY AND A.WAREKEY = B.WAREKEY AND A.OWNERKY = B.OWNERKY AND A.PTNRKEY = B.PTNRKEY AND A.BLRPMGB = B.BLRPMGB AND A.BLRCSGB = B.BLRCSGB AND A.BLRTKGB = B.BLRTKGB AND A.BLRDATE = B.BLRDATE WHERE 1=1

/* selectBmb02HeadList */ SELECT BH.COMPKEY, BH.WAREKEY, BH.BLHDCKY, BI.BLHDCIT , BH.LCVRFYN /* 정산검증여부 */ , BI.OWNERKY, MO.OWNAMLC , BI.BFLCODE, BI.BVLCODE, BI.BPLCODE , BI.PTNRKEY, MP.PTNAMLC , BI.BLRPMGB, MC.COMCDTX AS BLRPMNM , CASE WHEN BI.BLRTKNM != NULL OR TRIM(BI.BLRTKNM) != '' THEN BI.BLRTKNM ELSE BI.BLRCSGB END AS BLRCSGB , BI.BLRTKGB , BI.BLRUNIT, BI.DOCCATE, BI.DOCTYPE , BI.REFCQTY , BI.BLRCOST , BI.BLRAMOT , BI.BLRAMOT*(BI.BLRSUTX/100) AS BLRAMTX , (BI.BLRAMOT*(BI.BLRSUTX/100))+BI.BLRAMOT AS BLRSUMY , BI.BLRREMK /* 비고 */ FROM BLGTHD BH INNER JOIN BLGTIT BI ON BH.COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND BH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND BH.BLHDCKY = BI.BLHDCKY INNER JOIN MOWRMA MO ON BH.COMPKEY = MO.COMPKEY AND BI.OWNERKY = MO.OWNERKY INNER JOIN V_MCODEM MC ON BH.COMPKEY = MC.COMPKEY AND BI.BLRPMGB = MC.COMCDVL AND MC.COMCDKY = 'BLRPMGB' INNER JOIN MPTNMA MP ON BH.COMPKEY = MP.COMPKEY AND BI.PTNRKEY = MP.PTNRKEY WHERE BH.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND BH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND BH.BLHYYMM = REPLACE(#{blhyymm},'-','') AND BI.BLITYPE = 'SUM' AND BH.LCCNFYN = 'N'

/* selectBmb03HeadList */ SELECT COMPKEY, WAREKEY, BLHDCKY, CONCAT(SUBSTR(BLHYYMM, 1, 4),'-',SUBSTR(BLHYYMM, 5, 2)) AS BLHYYMM , DATE_FORMAT(BLSDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BLSDATE, DATE_FORMAT(BLEDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BLEDATE , LCDDATE, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, LCDUSER) as LCDUSER, LCVRFYN, LCVDATE , fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, LCVUSER) as LCVUSER, LCCNFYN, LCCDATE, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, LCCUSER) as LCCUSER , FN_COM_TODATE(CREDATE) as CREDATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(CRETIME) as CRETIME, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, CREUSER) as CREUSER, FN_COM_TODATE(LMODATE) as LMODATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(LMOTIME) as LMOTIME, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, LMOUSER) as LMOUSER, INDIBZL, INDIARC, UPDTCHK FROM BLGTHD WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND LCCNFYN = 'N'
AND BLHYYMM >= REPLACE(#{blhyymmfrom},'-','')
AND BLHYYMM <= REPLACE(#{blhyymmto},'-','')
AND BLHYYMM BETWEEN REPLACE(#{blhyymmfrom},'-','') AND REPLACE(#{blhyymmto},'-','')

/* selectBmb03ItemList */ SELECT BI.COMPKEY, BI.WAREKEY, BI.BLHDCKY, BI.OWNERKY, BI.PTNRKEY , BI.BLRPMGB , CASE WHEN BI.BLRTKNM != NULL OR TRIM(BI.BLRTKNM) != '' THEN BI.BLRTKNM ELSE BI.BLRCSGB END AS BLRCSGB , BI.BLRTKGB , BI.BLRUNIT, BI.DOCCATE, BI.DOCTYPE , BI.REFCQTY , BI.BLRCOST , BI.BLRAMOT , BI.BLRAMOT*(BI.BLRSUTX/100) AS BLRAMTX , (BI.BLRAMOT*(BI.BLRSUTX/100))+BI.BLRAMOT AS BLRSUMY , BI.BLRREMK /* 비고 */ FROM BLGTHD BH INNER JOIN BLGTIT BI ON BH.COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND BH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND BH.BLHDCKY = BI.BLHDCKY WHERE BH.COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND BH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND BH.BLHDCKY = #{blhdcky} AND BI.BLITYPE = 'SUM' AND BH.LCCNFYN = 'N' ORDER BY BI.COMPKEY, BI.WAREKEY, BI.BLHDCKY, BI.OWNERKY, BI.PTNRKEY, BI.BLRPMGB, BI.BLRCSGB, BI.BLRTKGB

/* selectBmb04HeadList */ SELECT COMPKEY, WAREKEY, BLHDCKY, CONCAT(SUBSTR(BLHYYMM, 1, 4),'-',SUBSTR(BLHYYMM, 5, 2)) AS BLHYYMM , DATE_FORMAT(BLSDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BLSDATE, DATE_FORMAT(BLEDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BLEDATE , LCDDATE, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, LCDUSER) as LCDUSER, LCVRFYN, LCVDATE, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, LCVUSER) as LCVUSER, LCCNFYN, LCCDATE, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, LCCUSER) as LCCUSER , FN_COM_TODATE(CREDATE) as CREDATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(CRETIME) as CRETIME, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, CREUSER) as CREUSER, FN_COM_TODATE(LMODATE) as LMODATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(LMOTIME) as LMOTIME, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, LMOUSER) as LMOUSER, INDIBZL, INDIARC, UPDTCHK FROM BLGTHD WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND WAREKEY = #{warekey}
AND BLHYYMM >= REPLACE(#{blhyymmfrom},'-','')
AND BLHYYMM <= REPLACE(#{blhyymmto},'-','')
AND BLHYYMM BETWEEN REPLACE(#{blhyymmfrom},'-','') AND REPLACE(#{blhyymmto},'-','')
AND upper(BLHDCKY) LIKE CONCAT('%', upper(#{blhdcky}), '%')
AND LCVRFYN = 'Y'
AND LCCNFYN = 'Y'

/* selectBmb04ItemList */ SELECT BI.COMPKEY, BI.WAREKEY, BI.BLHDCKY, BI.OWNERKY, BI.PTNRKEY , BI.BLRPMGB , CASE WHEN BI.BLRTKNM != NULL OR TRIM(BI.BLRTKNM) != '' THEN BI.BLRTKNM ELSE BI.BLRCSGB END AS BLRCSGB , BI.BLRTKGB , BI.BLRUNIT, BI.DOCCATE, BI.DOCTYPE , BI.REFCQTY , BI.BLRCOST , BI.BLRAMOT , BI.BLRAMOT*(BI.BLRSUTX/100) AS BLRAMTX , (BI.BLRAMOT*(BI.BLRSUTX/100))+BI.BLRAMOT AS BLRSUMY , BI.BLRREMK /* 비고 */ FROM BLGTHD BH INNER JOIN BLGTIT BI ON BH.COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND BH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND BH.BLHDCKY = BI.BLHDCKY WHERE BH.COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND BH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND BH.BLHDCKY = #{blhdcky} AND BI.BLITYPE = 'SUM' ORDER BY BI.COMPKEY, BI.WAREKEY, BI.BLHDCKY, BI.OWNERKY, BI.PTNRKEY, BI.BLRPMGB, BI.BLRCSGB, BI.BLRTKGB

/* selectBmb05List */ WITH BVMA AS ( SELECT A.COMPKEY, A.WAREKEY, A.PTNRKEY, A.BTRPMGB, A.BTRCSGB, A.BTRTKGB, A.SHTRTKY, A.VEHICKY, C.VHCFNAM , A.BTRUNIT, A.DOCCATE, A.DOCTYPE, A.BTRCOST, A.BTRSUTX, A.BTRTKNM , CASE WHEN A.BTRDTGB = 'Y' AND A.BTRMFGB = 'PM' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CONCAT(#{bthyymm}, A.BTRCFDT), INTERVAL 1 MONTH),'%Y%m%d') WHEN A.BTRDTGB = 'Y' AND A.BTRMFGB = 'TM' THEN DATE_FORMAT(CONCAT(#{bthyymm}, A.BTRCFDT),'%Y%m%d') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CONCAT(#{bthyymm},'01'),'%Y%m%d') END AS STRDATE , CASE WHEN A.BTRDTGB = 'Y' AND A.BTRMTGB = 'PM' THEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CONCAT(#{bthyymm}, A.BTRCTDT), INTERVAL 1 MONTH),'%Y%m%d') WHEN A.BTRDTGB = 'Y' AND A.BTRMTGB = 'TM' THEN DATE_FORMAT(CONCAT(#{bthyymm}, A.BTRCTDT),'%Y%m%d') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(CONCAT(#{bthyymm},'01')),'%Y%m%d') END AS LSTDATE FROM BVTRMA A INNER JOIN TVHCMA C ON A.COMPKEY = C.COMPKEY AND A.WAREKEY = C.WAREKEY AND A.VEHICKY = C.VEHICKY INNER JOIN ( SELECT COMPKEY, WAREKEY, PTNRKEY, BTRPMGB, BTRCSGB, BTRTKGB, SHTRTKY, VEHICKY, BTRUNIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, MAX(BTRDATE) AS BTRDATE FROM BVTRMA WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND BTRDATE <= #{bthyymm} AND BTUSEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY COMPKEY, WAREKEY, PTNRKEY, BTRPMGB, BTRCSGB, BTRTKGB, SHTRTKY, VEHICKY, BTRUNIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE ) B ON A.COMPKEY = B.COMPKEY AND A.WAREKEY = B.WAREKEY AND A.PTNRKEY = B.PTNRKEY AND A.BTRPMGB = B.BTRPMGB AND A.BTRCSGB = B.BTRCSGB AND A.BTRTKGB = B.BTRTKGB AND IFNULL(A.SHTRTKY,'') = IFNULL(B.SHTRTKY,'') AND A.VEHICKY = B.VEHICKY AND A.BTRUNIT = B.BTRUNIT AND A.DOCCATE = B.DOCCATE AND A.DOCTYPE = B.DOCTYPE AND A.BTRDATE = B.BTRDATE ) /* 개별운송비가 아닌 경우 처리 */ SELECT BV.COMPKEY, BV.WAREKEY , BV.PTNRKEY, MP.PTNAMLC , BV.BTRPMGB, MC.COMCDTX AS BTRPMNM /* 계정 순위 >> 1.명세표구분명 2. 829 타입은 명칭+노선, 나머지 타입은 계정코드 */ , CASE WHEN BV.BTRTKNM != NULL OR TRIM(BV.BTRTKNM) != '' THEN BV.BTRTKNM WHEN BV.DOCTYPE = '829' THEN CONCAT( (SELECT COMCDTX FROM V_MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = BV.COMPKEY AND COMCDVL = BV.BTRCSGB AND COMCDKY IN ('BTRFSGB','BTRVSGB')) ,'(' , (SELECT SHTRTNM FROM TSHRHD WHERE COMPKEY = BV.COMPKEY AND WAREKEY = BV.WAREKEY AND SHTRTKY = BV.SHTRTKY) ,')') ELSE BV.BTRCSGB END AS BTRCSGB , BV.DOCCATE, BV.DOCTYPE , TM.MDESTKY /* 공장(대표도착지) */ , BV.VEHICKY /* 차량코드 */ , BV.VHCFNAM /* 차량번호 */ , TM.OWNERNM AS USERACT /* 차주(기사명) */ , BV.BTRCOST /* 단가 */ , IFNULL(TH.REFCQTY,0) AS REFCQTY /* 운행횟수 */ , (BV.BTRCOST*IFNULL(TH.REFCQTY,0)) AS BTRAMOT /* 금액 */ FROM BVMA BV INNER JOIN TVHCMA TM ON BV.COMPKEY = TM.COMPKEY AND BV.WAREKEY = TM.WAREKEY AND BV.VEHICKY = TM.VEHICKY INNER JOIN MPTNMA MP ON BV.COMPKEY = MP.COMPKEY AND BV.PTNRKEY = MP.PTNRKEY INNER JOIN V_MCODEM MC ON BV.COMPKEY = MC.COMPKEY AND BV.BTRPMGB = MC.COMCDVL AND MC.COMCDKY = 'BTRPMGB' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TH.COMPKEY, TH.WAREKEY , COUNT(DISTINCT TH.VHPLNKY) as REFCQTY , BV.PTNRKEY, BV.BTRPMGB , TH.SHTRTKY, TH.VEHICKY, TH.DOCCATE, TH.DOCTYPE FROM TPLNHD TH INNER JOIN BVMA BV ON TH.COMPKEY = BV.COMPKEY AND TH.WAREKEY = BV.WAREKEY AND TH.VEHICKY = BV.VEHICKY AND TH.DOCCATE = BV.DOCCATE AND (CASE WHEN BV.DOCTYPE = '829' THEN (TH.SHTRTKY = BV.SHTRTKY AND TH.DOCTYPE = BV.DOCTYPE) ELSE TH.DOCTYPE = BV.DOCTYPE END) WHERE TH.POSTDAT BETWEEN BV.STRDATE AND BV.LSTDATE AND TH.PLNSTAT = 'FINISH' AND TH.PBILLYN = 'N' GROUP BY TH.COMPKEY, TH.WAREKEY, BV.PTNRKEY, BV.BTRPMGB, TH.SHTRTKY, TH.VEHICKY, TH.DOCCATE, TH.DOCTYPE ) TH ON BV.COMPKEY = TH.COMPKEY AND BV.WAREKEY = TH.WAREKEY AND BV.PTNRKEY = TH.PTNRKEY AND BV.BTRPMGB = TH.BTRPMGB AND BV.VEHICKY = TH.VEHICKY AND BV.DOCCATE = TH.DOCCATE AND (CASE WHEN BV.DOCTYPE = '829' THEN (TH.SHTRTKY = BV.SHTRTKY AND TH.DOCTYPE = BV.DOCTYPE) ELSE TH.DOCTYPE = BV.DOCTYPE END) WHERE 1=1 /* 금액 0 일 경우 제외. */ HAVING BTRAMOT > 0 UNION ALL /* 개별운송비용 처리 */ SELECT COMPKEY, WAREKEY, PTNRKEY, PTNAMLC, BTRPMGB, BTRPMNM, BTRCSGB, DOCCATE , DOCTYPE, MDESTKY, VEHICKY, VHCFNAM, USERACT, BTRCOST, REFCQTY, BTRAMOT FROM ( SELECT TH.COMPKEY, TH.WAREKEY, PT.PTNRKEY, PT.PTNAMLC , 'PAYMENT' AS BTRPMGB, MC.COMCDTX AS BTRPMNM , 'TRPCT' AS BTRCSGB, TH.DOCCATE, TH.DOCTYPE , TV.MDESTKY /* 공장(대표도착지) */ , TH.VEHICKY, TV.VHCFNAM /* 차량번호 */ , TV.OWNERNM AS USERACT /* 차주(기사명) */ , 0 AS BTRCOST , COUNT(DISTINCT TH.VHPLNKY) as REFCQTY , SUM(TH.PBILPAY) AS BTRAMOT /* 개별운송비용 */ FROM TPLNHD TH INNER JOIN TVHCMA TV ON TH.COMPKEY = TV.COMPKEY AND TH.WAREKEY = TV.WAREKEY AND TH.VEHICKY = TV.VEHICKY INNER JOIN MPTNMA PT ON TH.COMPKEY = PT.COMPKEY AND TV.CARRIER = PT.PTNRKEY INNER JOIN V_MCODEM MC ON TH.COMPKEY = MC.COMPKEY AND MC.COMCDKY = 'BTRPMGB' AND MC.COMCDVL = 'PAYMENT' WHERE 1=1 AND TH.POSTDAT BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(CONCAT(#{bthyymm},'01'),'%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(CONCAT(#{bthyymm},'01')),'%Y%m%d') AND TH.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND TH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND TH.DOCCATE = '800' AND TH.DOCTYPE IN ('820','830','870') /* 셔틀 납품, 권역 납품, 긴급운송 */ AND TH.PLNSTAT = 'FINISH' AND TH.PBILLYN = 'Y' GROUP BY TH.COMPKEY, TH.WAREKEY, PT.PTNRKEY, PT.PTNAMLC, MC.COMCDVL, MC.COMCDTX, TV.MDESTKY, TH.VEHICKY, TH.DOCCATE, TH.DOCTYPE, TV.VHCFNAM, TV.OWNERNM ) A WHERE 1=1 UNION ALL SELECT BF.COMPKEY, BF.WAREKEY , BF.PTNRKEY, MP.PTNAMLC , BF.BTRPMGB, MC.COMCDTX AS BTRPMNM , CASE WHEN BF.BTRTKNM != NULL OR TRIM(BF.BTRTKNM) != '' THEN BF.BTRTKNM ELSE BF.BTRCSGB END AS BTRCSGB , '-' AS DOCCATE, '-' AS DOCTYPE , TM.MDESTKY , BF.VEHICKY, TM.VHCFNAM, TM.OWNERNM AS USERACT , BF.BTRCOST, 0 AS REFCQTY, BF.BTRCOST AS BTRAMOT FROM BFTRMA BF INNER JOIN TVHCMA TM ON BF.COMPKEY = TM.COMPKEY AND BF.WAREKEY = TM.WAREKEY AND BF.VEHICKY = TM.VEHICKY INNER JOIN MPTNMA MP ON BF.COMPKEY = MP.COMPKEY AND BF.PTNRKEY = MP.PTNRKEY INNER JOIN V_MCODEM MC ON BF.COMPKEY = MC.COMPKEY AND BF.BTRPMGB = MC.COMCDVL AND MC.COMCDKY = 'BTRPMGB' INNER JOIN ( SELECT COMPKEY, WAREKEY, PTNRKEY, BTRPMGB, BTRCSGB, BTRTKGB, VEHICKY, MAX(BTRDATE) AS BTRDATE FROM BFTRMA WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND BTRDATE <= #{bthyymm} AND BTUSEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY COMPKEY, WAREKEY, PTNRKEY, BTRPMGB, BTRCSGB, BTRTKGB, VEHICKY ) B ON BF.COMPKEY = B.COMPKEY AND BF.WAREKEY = B.WAREKEY AND BF.PTNRKEY = B.PTNRKEY AND BF.BTRPMGB = B.BTRPMGB AND BF.BTRCSGB = B.BTRCSGB AND BF.BTRTKGB = B.BTRTKGB AND BF.VEHICKY = B.VEHICKY AND BF.BTRDATE = B.BTRDATE WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY COMPKEY, WAREKEY, PTNRKEY, BTRPMGB, VEHICKY, BTRCSGB

/* selectBmb06HeadList */ SELECT BH.COMPKEY, BH.WAREKEY, BH.BTHDCKY, BI.BTHDCIT , BH.TCVRFYN /* 정산검증여부 */ , BI.BFTCODE, BI.BVTCODE , BI.DOCCATE, BI.DOCTYPE , BI.PTNRKEY, MP.PTNAMLC , BI.BTRPMGB, MC.COMCDTX AS BTRPMNM /* 계정명칭 순위 >> 1.명세표구분명 2. 829 타입은 계정명+노선, 나머지 타입은 계정명 */ , CASE WHEN BI.BTRTKNM != NULL OR TRIM(BI.BTRTKNM) != '' THEN BI.BTRTKNM WHEN BI.DOCTYPE = '829' THEN CONCAT( (SELECT COMCDTX FROM V_MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND COMCDVL = BI.BTRCSGB AND COMCDKY IN ('BTRFSGB','BTRVSGB')) ,'(' , (SELECT SHTRTNM FROM TSHRHD WHERE COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND SHTRTKY = BI.SHTRTKY) ,')') ELSE (SELECT COMCDTX FROM V_MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND COMCDVL = BI.BTRCSGB AND COMCDKY IN ('BTRFSGB','BTRVSGB')) END AS BTRCSNM /* 계정명칭 */ , BI.BTRCSGB /* 계정 */ , BI.BTRUNIT , BI.MDESTKY /* 공장(대표도착지) */ , BI.VEHICKY /* 차량코드 */ , TM.OWNERNM AS USERACT /* 차주(기사명) */ , BI.BTRCOST /* 단가 */ , BI.REFCQTY /* 운행횟수/연장시간 */ , BI.BTRAMOT /* 금액 */ , BI.BTRREMK /* 비고 */ FROM BTGTHD BH INNER JOIN BTGTIT BI ON BH.COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND BH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND BH.BTHDCKY = BI.BTHDCKY INNER JOIN TVHCMA TM ON BH.COMPKEY = TM.COMPKEY AND BH.WAREKEY = TM.WAREKEY AND BI.VEHICKY = TM.VEHICKY INNER JOIN V_MCODEM MC ON BH.COMPKEY = MC.COMPKEY AND BI.BTRPMGB = MC.COMCDVL AND MC.COMCDKY = 'BTRPMGB' INNER JOIN MPTNMA MP ON BH.COMPKEY = MP.COMPKEY AND BI.PTNRKEY = MP.PTNRKEY WHERE BH.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND BH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND BH.BTHYYMM = REPLACE(#{bthyymm},'-','') AND BI.BTITYPE = 'SUM' AND BH.TCCNFYN = 'N' ORDER BY BH.COMPKEY, BH.WAREKEY, BI.PTNRKEY, BI.BTRPMGB, BI.MDESTKY, BI.VEHICKY, BI.BTRCSGB

/* selectBmb07HeadList */ SELECT COMPKEY, WAREKEY, BTHDCKY , CONCAT(SUBSTR(BTHYYMM, 1, 4),'-',SUBSTR(BTHYYMM, 5, 2)) AS BTHYYMM , DATE_FORMAT(BTSDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BTSDATE , DATE_FORMAT(BTEDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BTEDATE , TCDDATE, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, TCDUSER) as TCDUSER, TCVRFYN, TCVDATE, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, TCVUSER) as TCVUSER, TCCNFYN, TCCDATE, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, TCCUSER) as TCCUSER , FN_COM_TODATE(CREDATE) AS CREDATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(CRETIME) AS CRETIME, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, CREUSER) as CREUSER, FN_COM_TODATE(LMODATE) AS LMODATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(LMOTIME) AS LMOTIME, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, LMOUSER) as LMOUSER , INDIBZL, INDIARC, UPDTCHK FROM BTGTHD WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND TCCNFYN = 'N'
AND BTHYYMM >= REPLACE(#{bthyymmfrom},'-','')
AND BTHYYMM <= REPLACE(#{bthyymmto},'-','')
AND BTHYYMM BETWEEN REPLACE(#{bthyymmfrom},'-','') AND REPLACE(#{bthyymmto},'-','')

/* selectBmb07ItemList */ SELECT BI.COMPKEY, BI.WAREKEY, BI.BTHDCKY, BI.PTNRKEY , BI.BTRPMGB /* 계정명칭 순위 >> 1.명세표구분명 2. 829 타입은 계정명+노선, 나머지 타입은 계정명 */ , CASE WHEN BI.BTRTKNM != NULL OR TRIM(BI.BTRTKNM) != '' THEN BI.BTRTKNM WHEN BI.DOCTYPE = '829' THEN CONCAT( (SELECT COMCDTX FROM V_MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND COMCDVL = BI.BTRCSGB AND COMCDKY IN ('BTRFSGB','BTRVSGB')) ,'(' , (SELECT SHTRTNM FROM TSHRHD WHERE COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND SHTRTKY = BI.SHTRTKY) ,')') ELSE (SELECT COMCDTX FROM V_MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND COMCDVL = BI.BTRCSGB AND COMCDKY IN ('BTRFSGB','BTRVSGB')) END AS BTRCSNM /* 계정명칭 */ , BI.BTRCSGB /* 계정 */ , BI.BTRTKGB /* sub계정 */ , BI.VEHICKY /* 차량코드 */ , TM.OWNERNM AS USERACT /* 차주(기사명) */ , BI.MDESTKY, BI.BTRUNIT, BI.DOCCATE, BI.DOCTYPE , BI.REFCQTY, BI.BTRCOST, BI.BTRAMOT , BI.BTRREMK /* 비고 */ FROM BTGTHD BH INNER JOIN BTGTIT BI ON BH.COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND BH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND BH.BTHDCKY = BI.BTHDCKY INNER JOIN TVHCMA TM ON BH.COMPKEY = TM.COMPKEY AND BH.WAREKEY = TM.WAREKEY AND BI.VEHICKY = TM.VEHICKY WHERE BH.COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND BH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND BH.BTHDCKY = #{bthdcky} AND BI.BTITYPE = 'SUM' AND BH.TCCNFYN = 'N' ORDER BY BI.COMPKEY, BI.WAREKEY, BI.BTHDCKY, BI.PTNRKEY, BI.VEHICKY, BI.BTRPMGB, BI.BTRCSGB, BI.BTRTKGB

/* selectBmb08HeadList */ SELECT COMPKEY, WAREKEY, BTHDCKY, CONCAT(SUBSTR(BTHYYMM, 1, 4),'-',SUBSTR(BTHYYMM, 5, 2)) AS BTHYYMM , DATE_FORMAT(BTSDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BTSDATE, DATE_FORMAT(BTEDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BTEDATE , TCDDATE, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, TCDUSER) AS TCDUSER, TCVRFYN, TCVDATE, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, TCVUSER) AS TCVUSER, TCCNFYN, TCCDATE, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, TCCUSER) AS TCCUSER , FN_COM_TODATE(CREDATE) AS CREDATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(CRETIME) AS CRETIME, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, CREUSER) as CREUSER, FN_COM_TODATE(LMODATE) AS LMODATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(LMOTIME) AS LMOTIME , fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, LMOUSER) as LMOUSER, INDIBZL, INDIARC, UPDTCHK FROM BTGTHD WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND WAREKEY = #{warekey}
AND BTHYYMM >= REPLACE(#{bthyymmfrom},'-','')
AND BTHYYMM <= REPLACE(#{bthyymmto},'-','')
AND BTHYYMM BETWEEN REPLACE(#{bthyymmfrom},'-','') AND REPLACE(#{bthyymmto},'-','')
AND upper(BTHDCKY) LIKE CONCAT('%', upper(#{bthdcky}), '%')
AND TCVRFYN = 'Y'
AND TCCNFYN = 'Y'

/* selectBmb08ItemList */ SELECT BI.COMPKEY, BI.WAREKEY, BI.BTHDCKY, BI.PTNRKEY , BI.BTRPMGB /* 계정명칭 순위 >> 1.명세표구분명 2. 829 타입은 계정명+노선, 나머지 타입은 계정명 */ , CASE WHEN BI.BTRTKNM != NULL OR TRIM(BI.BTRTKNM) != '' THEN BI.BTRTKNM WHEN BI.DOCTYPE = '829' THEN CONCAT( (SELECT COMCDTX FROM V_MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND COMCDVL = BI.BTRCSGB AND COMCDKY IN ('BTRFSGB','BTRVSGB')) ,'(' , (SELECT SHTRTNM FROM TSHRHD WHERE COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND SHTRTKY = BI.SHTRTKY) ,')') ELSE (SELECT COMCDTX FROM V_MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND COMCDVL = BI.BTRCSGB AND COMCDKY IN ('BTRFSGB','BTRVSGB')) END AS BTRCSNM /* 계정명칭 */ , BI.BTRCSGB /* 계정 */ , BI.BTRTKGB /* sub계정 */ , BI.VEHICKY /* 차량코드 */ , TM.OWNERNM AS USERACT /* 차주(기사명) */ , BI.MDESTKY, BI.BTRUNIT, BI.DOCCATE, BI.DOCTYPE , BI.REFCQTY, BI.BTRCOST, BI.BTRAMOT , BI.BTRREMK /* 비고 */ FROM BTGTHD BH INNER JOIN BTGTIT BI ON BH.COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND BH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND BH.BTHDCKY = BI.BTHDCKY INNER JOIN TVHCMA TM ON BH.COMPKEY = TM.COMPKEY AND BH.WAREKEY = TM.WAREKEY AND BI.VEHICKY = TM.VEHICKY WHERE BH.COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND BH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND BH.BTHDCKY = #{bthdcky} AND BI.BTITYPE = 'SUM' ORDER BY BI.COMPKEY, BI.WAREKEY, BI.BTHDCKY, BI.PTNRKEY, BI.VEHICKY, BI.BTRPMGB, BI.BTRCSGB, BI.BTRTKGB

/* selectBmb09HeadList */ SELECT BH.COMPKEY, BH.WAREKEY, BH.BTHDCKY , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY BH.COMPKEY, BH.WAREKEY, BH.BTHDCKY ORDER BY BI.VEHICKY ) AS BTHDCIT , SUM(BI.REFCQTY) AS REFCQTY /* 운행횟수 */ , BI.BTRPMGB /* 대금구분 */ , BI.VEHICKY /* 차량코드 */ , SUM(BI.BTRAMOT) AS BTRAMOT /* 금액 */ , TM.OWNERNM /* 기사명 */ , TP.USERACT /* 차주 계정 */ , FN_COM_TODATE(BH.CREDATE) AS CREDATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(BH.CRETIME) AS CRETIME, FN_SY_USERNAM(BH.COMPKEY, BH.CREUSER) AS CREUSER FROM BTGTHD BH INNER JOIN BTGTIT BI ON BH.COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND BH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND BH.BTHDCKY = BI.BTHDCKY INNER JOIN TVHCMA TM ON BH.COMPKEY = TM.COMPKEY AND BH.WAREKEY = TM.WAREKEY AND BI.VEHICKY = TM.VEHICKY LEFT JOIN TPVASS TP ON BH.COMPKEY = TP.COMPKEY AND BH.WAREKEY = TP.WAREKEY AND BI.VEHICKY = TP.VEHICKY WHERE BH.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND BH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND BH.BTHYYMM = REPLACE(#{bthyymm},'-','') AND BI.BTITYPE = 'SUM' AND (BI.DOCTYPE IN ('829') OR TRIM(BI.BFTCODE) IS NOT NULL) AND BI.BTRPMGB = 'PAYMENT' GROUP BY BH.COMPKEY, BH.WAREKEY, BH.BTHDCKY, BI.BTRPMGB, BI.VEHICKY, TM.OWNERNM

/* selectBmb09ItemList */ /* 변동비(기사실적) */ SELECT BI.COMPKEY, BI.WAREKEY, BI.BTHDCKY, BI.DOCCATE, BI.DOCTYPE , BI.BTRCSGB , FN_COM_TODATE(BI.POSTDAT) AS POSTDAT , SUM(BI.REFCQTY) AS REFCQTY /* 운행횟수/연장시간 */ , MAX(BI.BTRCOST) AS BTRCOST /* 단가(원) */ , SUM(BI.BTRAMOT) AS BTRAMOT /* 금액 */ , BI.SHTRTKY /* 셔틀노선 */ , FN_COM_TODATE(BI.CREDATE) AS CREDATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(BI.CRETIME) AS CRETIME, FN_SY_USERNAM(BI.COMPKEY, BI.CREUSER) as CREUSER FROM BTGTHD BH INNER JOIN BTGTIT BI ON BH.COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND BH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND BH.BTHDCKY = BH.BTHDCKY WHERE BH.COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND BH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND BH.BTHDCKY = #{bthdcky} AND BI.BTRPMGB = #{btrpmgb} AND BI.VEHICKY = #{vehicky} AND BI.BTITYPE = 'ROW' AND (BI.DOCTYPE IN ('829')) GROUP BY BI.COMPKEY, BI.WAREKEY, BI.BTHDCKY, BI.DOCCATE, BI.DOCTYPE, BI.BTRCSGB, BI.POSTDAT, BI.SHTRTKY UNION ALL /* 고정비 */ SELECT BI.COMPKEY, BI.WAREKEY, BI.BTHDCKY, BI.DOCCATE, BI.DOCTYPE , BI.BTRCSGB , FN_COM_TODATE(BI.POSTDAT) AS POSTDAT , SUM(BI.REFCQTY) AS REFCQTY /* 운행횟수/연장시간 */ , MAX(BI.BTRCOST) AS BTRCOST /* 단가(원) */ , SUM(BI.BTRAMOT) AS BTRAMOT /* 금액 */ , BI.SHTRTKY /* 셔틀노선 */ , FN_COM_TODATE(BI.CREDATE) AS CREDATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(BI.CRETIME) AS CRETIME, FN_SY_USERNAM(BI.COMPKEY, BI.CREUSER) as CREUSER FROM BTGTHD BH INNER JOIN BTGTIT BI ON BH.COMPKEY = BI.COMPKEY AND BH.WAREKEY = BI.WAREKEY AND BH.BTHDCKY = BH.BTHDCKY WHERE BH.COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND BH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND BH.BTHDCKY = #{bthdcky} AND BI.BTRPMGB = #{btrpmgb} AND BI.VEHICKY = #{vehicky} AND BI.BTITYPE = 'SUM' AND BI.DOCTYPE = '-' /* 임시 */ GROUP BY BI.COMPKEY, BI.WAREKEY, BI.BTHDCKY, BI.DOCCATE, BI.DOCTYPE, BI.BTRCSGB, BI.POSTDAT, BI.SHTRTKY ORDER BY POSTDAT
/* fn_bm_bftdtky */ select fn_bm_bftdtky() as bftdtky from dual
